templateName: Scheduled Plan Upgrade Next Billing Cycle (India)
description: Notification for plan upgrade scheduled for the next billing cycle for Indian customers.

emailSubjectAllLocales.value: Your Concord Plan Upgrade Has Been Scheduled

templateContentAllLocales.value:
The Future of Commerce

Hi {{Tenant_Name}},

Thank you for choosing to upgrade your Concord subscription.

Your plan change has been successfully scheduled and will take effect at the start of your next billing cycle.

Upgrade Summary

  • New Plan: {{Package_Name}}
  • Upgrade Effective From: {{Tenant_Subscription_ValidTo}}
  • Next Billing Date: {{Tenant_Subscription_ValidTo}}

The upgraded plan will become active from the above billing date. No payment has been charged at this time. To enable automatic billing for your upcoming renewal, a temporary authorization charge of ₹ 5

has been processed on your payment method. This amount will be automatically refunded.

If you used a different credit card while scheduling this plan change, that card will be saved and used for future subscription payments starting from the next billing cycle.

On your next billing date, the new plan amount will be automatically charged using your saved payment method as per the existing payment mandate. Your recurring billing date will remain unchanged.

Once the upgrade becomes effective, you will be able to access all the features included in your new plan.

Thank you for growing with Concord.

-Team Concord Commerce

https://concordcommerce.com
